creator: eti@erata.net
text:
The port qt4-psql-plugin-4.3.0 and qt-psql-plugin-3.3.8_1 both install the same file ( lib/plugins/sqldrivers/libqsqlpsql.so ) in the same place. Probably the same goes for other qt - sqlplugins.

Fix: 

Not sure at the moment but installing one version of the file in another folder sounds like a good idea
How-To-Repeat: Install database/qt-pgsql-plugin and the plugin works. Then install  database/qt4-pgsql-plugin and the libqsqlpsql.so is overwritten.
